top_signals.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
top_signals.summary: Oil edged higher after President Donald Trump played down the prospect of near-term talks with Iran while threatening further strikes, as risks to global supply spread beyond the Middle East to the Black Sea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IEA warns of risk to energy supplies from escalation of Iran conflict
top_signals.summary: Intergovernmental agency says ‘no room for complacency’ and points to tightness in refined products
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong Home Prices Set for 19% Rebound Over Two Years: BI
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong home prices are expected to rebound the most in nearly a decade in 2026, driven by strong mainland Chinese demand, limited supply and robust rental growth, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
